insight.headline: Functions gain network access — action needed
insight.what_changed: Shopify Functions can now make outbound HTTP requests during execution via a new fetch target. Requests run against a strict domain allowlist within a 500 ms budget, and the capability ships behind the 2025-10 API version.
insight.developer_impact: You can call pricing, tax or inventory services directly from a Function instead of pre-computing values in the Admin. Register allowed domains in shopify.extension.toml and handle timeouts defensively — a slow endpoint fails the whole Function, and cold-start latency counts against your 500 ms budget, so cache aggressively.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants get accurate, real-time discounts and shipping rates without third-party apps injecting scripts at checkout.
insight.why_it_matters: This closes the biggest gap between Functions and legacy Scripts, making Functions viable for dynamic, data-driven checkout logic.

also_worth_knowing.text: Hydrogen 2025.7 adds first-class React Router 7 support
Admin API 2024-10 reaches end of life on Oct 1
Checkout UI Extensions 2025-10 is now generally available

updates.title: Hydrogen 2025.7 ships React Router 7 support
updates.summary: The starter and core hooks now target React Router 7, replacing the Remix-based routing layer.

updates.title: GraphQL Admin API 2024-10 reaches end of life
updates.summary: Queries against version 2024-10 will start returning errors after October 1. Move to 2025-01 or later.

updates.title: Shopify CLI 3.70 cuts dev cold-starts by ~40%
updates.summary: App preview boots faster thanks to a rebuilt bundler pipeline and smarter caching of extension builds.

updates.title: Checkout UI Extensions API 2025-10 is stable
updates.summary: The 2025-10 target graduates from release-candidate. New buyer-journey APIs and settings are locked in.

updates.title: Polaris deprecates legacy Card subcomponents
updates.summary: Card.Section and Card.Header are deprecated in favour of the composable Card + Box/BlockStack pattern.

updates.title: Metafield definitions no longer drop on bulk import
updates.summary: A regression that removed metafield definitions during large bulk operations has been resolved.

updates.title: Customer Account API adds B2B company context
updates.summary: Storefronts can now read the buyer's company and location directly from the Customer Account API.

recap.headline: Checkout got programmable — and the 2024-10 API is sunsetting.

themes.title: Functions grow up
themes.detail: Network access lands behind API 2025-10, letting Functions call external services at checkout. This is the week's biggest capability jump for app developers.

themes.title: The 2024-10 clock is ticking
themes.detail: GraphQL Admin API 2024-10 hits end of life on Oct 1. Any queries still pinned to it will start erroring — plan the bump to 2025-01+.

themes.title: Tooling and framework refresh
themes.detail: Hydrogen 2025.7 adopts React Router 7 and CLI 3.70 cuts cold-starts ~40%, so local dev gets faster this week.

actions.text: Migrate Admin API calls off version 2024-10
Register allowed domains before adopting Function network access
Test your app against Hydrogen 2025.7 / React Router 7
